heading: Definitions
label: 3902 Definitions
notes: References in TextSection 25(a) of the Federal Reserve Act, referred to in pars. (1) and (2)(A), which is classified to subchapter II (§ 611 et seq.) of chapter 6 of this title, was renumbered section 25A of that act by , , . Section 25 of the Federal Reserve Act is classified to subchapter I (§ 601 et seq.) of chapter 6 of this title.Pub. children.label: A
children.text: bank holding companies and any nonbank subsidiary thereof;

children.label: B
children.text: Edge Act corporations organized under section 25(a) of the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.]; and112 U.S.C. 611See References in Text note below.1

children.label: C
children.text: Agreement Corporations operating under section 25 of the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.]; and12 U.S.C. 601

children.label: i
children.text: an insured bank as defined in or any subsidiary of an insured bank;section 1813(h) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: an Edge Act corporation organized under section 25(a) of the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.]; and112 U.S.C. 611

children.label: iii
children.text: an Agreement Corporation operating under section 25 of the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.]; and12 U.S.C. 601

children.label: B
children.text: to the extent determined by the appropriate Federal banking agency, any agency or branch of a foreign bank, and any commercial lending company owned or controlled by one or more foreign banks or companies that control a foreign bank as those terms are defined in the International Banking Act of 1978 [ et seq.]. The term “banking institution” shall not include a foreign bank.12 U.S.C. 3101
